mapper.select: SELECT p.postid, p.postname, p.postdetail, p.member_id, m.name AS writerName FROM post p JOIN member_table m ON p.member_id = m.member_id ORDER BY p.postid DESC
SELECT p.postid, p.postname, p.postdetail, p.member_id, m.name AS writerName FROM post p JOIN member_table m ON p.member_id = m.member_id WHERE p.member_id = #{member_id} ORDER BY p.postid DESC
SELECT p.postid, p.postname, p.postdetail, p.member_id, m.name AS writerName FROM post p JOIN member_table m ON p.member_id = m.member_id ORDER BY p.postid DESC LIMIT 5;
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO post ( postname, postdetail, member_id) VALUES ( #{postname}, #{postdetail}, #{member_id})
mapper.select: SELECT p.postid, p.postname, p.postdetail, p.member_id, m.name AS writerName FROM post p JOIN member_table m ON p.member_id = m.member_id WHERE postid = #{id}
